items.name: Precise GPS location
items.sourceQuote: We collect your precise GPS location in real time.

items.name: Biometric data
items.sourceQuote: We collect face recognition data for identity verification.

items.name: Health data
items.sourceQuote: We collect health and fitness information from connected devices.

items.name: Financial data
items.sourceQuote: We collect bank account and credit card information.

items.name: Browsing history
items.sourceQuote: We collect your full browsing history via our SDK.

collectsPreciseGeolocation.sourceQuote: We collect your precise GPS location in real time.

collectsBiometricData.sourceQuote: We collect face recognition data for identity verification.

collectsHealthData.sourceQuote: We collect health and fitness information from connected devices.

collectsFinancialData.sourceQuote: We collect bank account and credit card information.

soldToThirdParties.sourceQuote: We may sell your personal information to third-party data brokers and marketing partners.

sharedForAdvertising.sourceQuote: We share your data with advertising networks for cross-context behavioral advertising.

crossSiteTracking.sourceQuote: Our advertising partners track you across websites and apps.

usedForProfiling.sourceQuote: We use automated decision-making and profiling to personalize your experience and make credit decisions.

usedToTrainAI.sourceQuote: We may use your data to train our AI and machine learning models.

disclosedToLawEnforcement.sourceQuote: We will share your data with law enforcement upon request, including without a court order in emergency situations.

thirdPartyRecipients.sourceQuote: We share data with a broad range of third parties including data brokers, advertisers, and government agencies.

provideCoreService.sourceQuote: We use data to provide our service.

securityFraudPrevention.sourceQuote: We use data for fraud prevention.

advertisingMarketing.sourceQuote: We use data for targeted advertising and marketing.

analyticsResearch.sourceQuote: We use data for analytics and research.

serviceImprovement.sourceQuote: We use data to improve our services.

aiMlTraining.sourceQuote: We use your data to train our AI models.

thirdPartyDataPartnerships.sourceQuote: We share data broadly with third-party partners.

other.description: Sold to data brokers and credit bureaus
other.sourceQuote: We may sell data to data brokers and credit bureaus.

retention.summary: Data retained indefinitely unless deletion is requested.
retention.sourceQuote: We retain your data indefinitely unless you request deletion.

rightToAccess.sourceQuote: No explicit right to access mentioned in the policy.

rightToDelete.sourceQuote: We may retain data even after an account deletion request for legal and business purposes.

rightToOptOut.sourceQuote: You cannot opt out of core data sharing as it is required to use the service.

gpcDetail.sourceQuote: We do not honor Global Privacy Control signals.

dntDetail.sourceQuote: We do not honor Do Not Track browser signals.

encryptedInTransit.sourceQuote: Policy does not address encryption in transit.

encryptedAtRest.sourceQuote: Policy does not address encryption at rest.

breachNotification.sourceQuote: Policy does not address breach notification.
